title: dendrolobium stipatum
intro: Dendrolobium stipatum, also known as the Australian pea tree, is a plant species native to Australia and Asia, characterized by its small, pea-like flowers and edible seeds. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The seeds of Dendrolobium stipatum have been found to have potential health benefits, such as lowering cholesterol levels and reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease. Dendrolobium stipatum is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
